Sarah M.2:30 PM

Can someone help me with question 3.2? I'm stuck on the integration part.

Mr. Johnson
Tutor
2:32 PM

Remember to use substitution method. Let u = x² + 1, then du = 2x dx.

Thabo M.2:35 PM

Thanks! That makes sense now. I was overcomplicating it.
